description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a sleek black leather upholstery and a wooden frame. The seat features a single, tufted cushion that spans the entire width, providing a plush and uniform sitting surface. Five large, loose black cushions are arranged along the backrest, offering both comfort and a contemporary aesthetic. The armrests are straight and constructed from wood, matching the back panel, and rise to the same height as the backrest. The sofa stands on four black metal sled legs, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The overall design is minimalist yet sophisticated, suitable for urban environments such as lofts, lobbies, or upscale public spaces.
description: A modern black leather sofa with a wooden frame, tufted seat, and five loose back cushions, supported by black metal sled legs. Its sleek, minimalist design is both comfortable and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, five loose black cushions, tufted seat, and straight wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden armrest, the depth of the seat, and the arrangement of the cushions along the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel and the tops of the back cushions peeking over the edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the wooden armrest and the staggered placement of the cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five large, loose back cushions arranged in a single row, with a single, wide, tufted seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat wooden armrests at seat height, matching the back panel, with a minimalist, unpadded design and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four black metal sled legs, positioned at the corners, with a rectangular profile and exposed, modern appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous wooden backrest with loose cushions providing additional height and comfort; no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black leather upholstery with visible tufting on the seat cushion, smooth texture on the back and armrests, and no decorative stitching or patterned fabric.
